trans-unit.source: This transaction has been replaced by:
trans-unit.target: This transaction has been replaced by:

trans-unit.source: Broadcast a raw transaction to the network. The transaction should be provided as hex in the request body. The txid will be returned on success.
trans-unit.target: Broadcast a raw transaction to the network. The transaction should be provided as hex in the request body. The txid will be returned on success.

trans-unit.source: Returns the spending status of all transaction outputs.
trans-unit.target: Returns the spending status of all transaction outputs.

trans-unit.source: Returns statistics about all Bisq transactions.
trans-unit.target: Returns statistics about all Bisq transactions.

trans-unit.source: There are too many transactions on this address, more than your backend can handle. See more on setting up a stronger backend. Consider viewing this address on the official BCH Explorer website instead: https://bchexplorer.cash/address/
trans-unit.target: There are too many transactions on this address, more than your backend can handle. See more on setting up a stronger backend. Consider viewing this address on the official BCH Explorer website instead: https://bchexplorer.cash/address/

trans-unit.source: See mempool transactions, confirmed transactions, balance, and more for Bitcoin Cash address .
trans-unit.target: See mempool transactions, confirmed transactions, balance, and more for Bitcoin Cash address .

trans-unit.source: Returns a list of transactions in the block (up to 25 transactions beginning at start_index). Transactions returned here do not have the status field, since all the transactions share the same block and confirmation status.
trans-unit.target: Returns a list of transactions in the block (up to 25 transactions beginning at start_index). Transactions returned here do not have the status field, since all the transactions share the same block and confirmation status.

trans-unit.source: See mempool transactions, confirmed transactions, balance, and more for Bitcoin Cash wallet .
trans-unit.target: See mempool transactions, confirmed transactions, balance, and more for Bitcoin Cash wallet .

trans-unit.source: Your browser does not support this feature.
trans-unit.target: Uw browser ondersteunt deze functie niet.

trans-unit.source: Significant Bitcoin Cash blocks, including halvings, hard forks, protocol upgrades, and other milestones — past and future.
trans-unit.target: Significant Bitcoin Cash blocks, including halvings, hard forks, protocol upgrades, and other milestones — past and future.

trans-unit.source: Returns details about a block. Available fields: id, height, version, timestamp, bits, nonce, merkle_root, tx_count, size, weight,proof, and previousblockhash.
trans-unit.target: Returns details about a block. Available fields: id, height, version, timestamp, bits, nonce, merkle_root, tx_count, size, weight,proof, and previousblockhash.

trans-unit.source: This transaction could save % on fees by upgrading to native SegWit-Bech32 or % by upgrading to SegWit-P2SH
trans-unit.target: This transaction could save % on fees by upgrading to native SegWit-Bech32 or % by upgrading to SegWit-P2SH

trans-unit.source: bchexplorer.cash merely provides data about the Bitcoin Cash network. It cannot help you with retrieving funds, wallet issues, etc. For any such requests, you need to get in touch with the entity that helped make the transaction (wallet software, exchange company, etc).
trans-unit.target: mempool.space levert alleen gegevens over het Bitcoin-netwerk. Het kan u niet helpen met het ophalen van geld, portemonneeproblemen, enz.Voor dergelijke verzoeken moet u contact opnemen met met de entiteit die heeft geholpen bij het uitvoeren van de transactie (portemonneesoftware, wisselkantoor, enz.).

trans-unit.source: Get the full list of txids in the mempool as an array. The order of the txids is arbitrary and does not match bitcoind.
trans-unit.target: Get the full list of txids in the mempool as an array. The order of the txids is arbitrary and does not match bitcoind.

trans-unit.source: BCH Explorer is a blockchain and mempool explorer for the Bitcoin Cash community, created by Melroy van den Berg. It is a completely self-hosted without any trusted third-parties.
trans-unit.target: BCH Explorer is a blockchain and mempool explorer for the Bitcoin Cash community, created by Melroy van den Berg. It is a completely self-hosted without any trusted third-parties.

trans-unit.source: Amount being paid to miners in the past 144 blocks
trans-unit.target: Bedrag betaald aan miners in de afgelopen 144 blokken

trans-unit.source: This transaction was seen in the mempool prior to mining
trans-unit.target: Deze transactie werd vóór mining in de mempool gezien

trans-unit.source: Significant Bitcoin Cash blocks, including halvings, hard forks, protocol upgrades, and other milestones — past and future.
trans-unit.target: Significant Bitcoin Cash blocks, including halvings, hard forks, protocol upgrades, and other milestones — past and future.

trans-unit.source: See mempool size (in MB) and transactions per second (in B/s) visualized over time.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk de mempoolgrootte (in MvB) en transacties per seconde (in vB/s) gevisualiseerd in de loop van de tijd.

trans-unit.source: Fee paid on average for each transaction in the past 144 blocks
trans-unit.target: Gemiddeld betaalde transactiekosten per transactie in de laatste 144 blokken

trans-unit.source: This block does not belong to the main chain, it has been replaced by:
trans-unit.target: Dit blok behoort niet tot de hoofdketen, het is vervangen door:

trans-unit.source: This transaction may have been added out-of-band
trans-unit.target: Deze transactie is mogelijk out-of-band toegevoegd

trans-unit.source: Based on average native transaction of 140 Bytes
trans-unit.target: Gebaseerd op een gemiddelde native segwit-transactie van 140 vBytes

trans-unit.source: Get real-time status, addresses, fees, script info, and more for Bitcoin Cash transaction with txid .
trans-unit.target: Ontvang realtime status, adressen, kosten, scriptinformatie en meer voor transactie met txid .

trans-unit.source: This is a test network. Coins have no value.
trans-unit.target: Dit is een testnetwerk. Munten hebben geen waarde.

trans-unit.source: Returns a transaction serialized as hex.
trans-unit.target: Returns a transaction serialized as hex.

trans-unit.source: Returns the hash of the block currently at :height.
trans-unit.target: Returns the hash of the block currently at :height.

trans-unit.source: This transaction was missing from our mempool prior to mining
trans-unit.target: Deze transactie ontbrak in onze mempool vóór mining

trans-unit.source: See Bitcoin block rewards in BCH and USD visualized over time. Block rewards are the total funds miners earn from the block subsidy and fees.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk Bitcoin-blokbeloningen in BTC en USD in de loop van de tijd gevisualiseerd. Blokbeloningen zijn het totale bedrag dat mijnwerkers verdienen aan de bloksubsidie en vergoedingen.

trans-unit.source: Returns a list of all txids in the block.
trans-unit.target: Returns a list of all txids in the block.

trans-unit.source: Returns our currently suggested fees for new transactions.
trans-unit.target: Returns our currently suggested fees for new transactions.

trans-unit.source: Returns the transaction at index :index within the specified block.
trans-unit.target: Returns the transaction at index :index within the specified block.

trans-unit.source: Usually places your transaction in between the second and third mempool blocks
trans-unit.target: Plaatst je transactie gewoonlijk tussen het tweede en derde mempoolblok

trans-unit.source: There are stale blocks at this height
trans-unit.target: Er zijn rotte blokken op deze hoogte

trans-unit.source: Waiting for it to appear in the mempool...
trans-unit.target: Wachten tot het in de mempool verschijnt...

trans-unit.source: See Bitcoin Cash block sizes (MB) visualized over time.
trans-unit.target: See Bitcoin Cash block sizes (MB) visualized over time.

trans-unit.source: Get the current total supply of the specified asset. For the native asset (L-BTC), this is calculated as [chain,mempool]_stats.peg_in_amount - [chain,mempool]_stats.peg_out_amount - [chain,mempool]_stats.burned_amount. For issued assets, this is calculated as [chain,mempool]_stats.issued_amount - [chain,mempool]_stats.burned_amount. Not available for assets with blinded issuances. If /decimal is specified, returns the supply as a decimal according to the asset's divisibility. Otherwise, returned in base units.
trans-unit.target: Get the current total supply of the specified asset. For the native asset (L-BTC), this is calculated as [chain,mempool]_stats.peg_in_amount - [chain,mempool]_stats.peg_out_amount - [chain,mempool]_stats.burned_amount. For issued assets, this is calculated as [chain,mempool]_stats.issued_amount - [chain,mempool]_stats.burned_amount. Not available for assets with blinded issuances. If /decimal is specified, returns the supply as a decimal according to the asset's divisibility. Otherwise, returned in base units.
Fout bij het laden van transactiegegevens.

trans-unit.source: See the Bitcoin Cash price in USD visualized over time.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk de Bitcoinprijs in USD gevisualiseerd in de loop van de tijd.

trans-unit.source: Returns the height of the last block.
trans-unit.target: Returns the height of the last block.

trans-unit.source: Testnet3 is deprecated, and will soon be replaced by Testnet4
trans-unit.target: Testnet3 is verouderd en wordt binnenkort vervangen door Testnet4
Fout bij het laden van portemonneegegevens.

trans-unit.source: The mempool open-source project aims to implement a high quality explorer and visualization website for the entire Bitcoin ecosystem, without distractions like altcoins, advertising, or third-party trackers.
trans-unit.target: The mempool open-source project aims to implement a high quality explorer and visualization website for the entire Bitcoin ecosystem, without distractions like altcoins, advertising, or third-party trackers.

trans-unit.source: This transaction conflicted with another version in our mempool
trans-unit.target: Deze transactie was in strijd met een andere versie in onze mempool

trans-unit.source: Returns transactions associated with the specified Liquid asset. For the network's native asset, returns a list of peg in, peg out, and burn transactions. For user-issued assets, returns a list of issuance, reissuance, and burn transactions. Does not include regular transactions transferring this asset.
trans-unit.target: Returns transactions associated with the specified Liquid asset. For the network's native asset, returns a list of peg in, peg out, and burn transactions. For user-issued assets, returns a list of issuance, reissuance, and burn transactions. Does not include regular transactions transferring this asset.

trans-unit.source: Get the list of unspent transaction outputs associated with the address/scripthash. Available fields: txid, vout, value, and status (with the status of the funding tx).There is also a valuecommitment field that may appear in place of value, plus the following additional fields: asset/assetcommitment, nonce/noncecommitment, surjection_proof, and range_proof.
trans-unit.target: Get the list of unspent transaction outputs associated with the address/scripthash. Available fields: txid, vout, value, and status (with the status of the funding tx).There is also a valuecommitment field that may appear in place of value, plus the following additional fields: asset/assetcommitment, nonce/noncecommitment, surjection_proof, and range_proof.

trans-unit.source: Overview of the mining pools on Bitcoin Cash.
trans-unit.target: Overview of the mining pools on Bitcoin Cash.

trans-unit.source: Only ~ sat/B was needed to get into this block
trans-unit.target: Er was maar ~ sat/vB nodig om in dit blok te komen

trans-unit.source: Either 2x the minimum, or the Low Priority rate (whichever is lower)
trans-unit.target: Of 2x het minimum, of het lage prioriteitstarief (welke van beide lager is)

trans-unit.source: If you like this project and use the explorer on a regular basis, please consider donating.
trans-unit.target: If you like this project and use the explorer on a regular basis, please consider donating.

trans-unit.source: This transaction support Replace-By-Fee (RBF) allowing fee bumping
trans-unit.target: This transaction support Replace-By-Fee (RBF) allowing fee bumping
Fout bij het laden van adresdata.

trans-unit.source: Usually places your transaction in between the first and second mempool blocks
trans-unit.target: Plaatst je transactie gewoonlijk tussen het eerste en tweede mempoolblok

trans-unit.source: Get confirmed transaction history for the specified address/scripthash, sorted with newest first. Returns 25 transactions per page. More can be requested by specifying the last txid seen by the previous query.
trans-unit.target: Get confirmed transaction history for the specified address/scripthash, sorted with newest first. Returns 25 transactions per page. More can be requested by specifying the last txid seen by the previous query.

trans-unit.source: By sponsoring me you are supporting my work and ensuring that the BCH Explorer project remains up-to-date, stable and available to the whole Bitcoin Cash community. As well as extending this BCH Explorer for specific BCH features. Are you interested in becoming an enterprise sponsor and getting your company listed on this site? Feel free to reach out via Telegram.
trans-unit.target: By sponsoring me you are supporting my work and ensuring that the BCH Explorer project remains up-to-date, stable and available to the whole Bitcoin Cash community. As well as extending this BCH Explorer for specific BCH features. Are you interested in becoming an enterprise sponsor and getting your company listed on this site? Feel free to reach out via Telegram.

trans-unit.source: Maintaining, improving and creating this BCH explorer costs a lot of time and effort. As a one-man operation, I spend a lot of personal time working on this project.
trans-unit.target: Maintaining, improving and creating this BCH explorer costs a lot of time and effort. As a one-man operation, I spend a lot of personal time working on this project.

trans-unit.source: Returns details about a Bisq transaction.
trans-unit.target: Returns details about a Bisq transaction.

trans-unit.source: Show more inputs to reveal fee data
trans-unit.target: Toon meer inputs om vergoedingsgegevens te onthullen

trans-unit.source: Transaction cannot be broadcasted because it's missing signature(s)
trans-unit.target: Transactie kan niet worden uitgezonden omdat er handtekening(en) ontbreken

trans-unit.source: See size, fee range, included transactions, audit (expected vs actual), and more for Bitcoin Cash block ().
trans-unit.target: Bekijk de grootte, het gewicht, het tariefbereik, de inbegrepen transacties en meer voor Liquid blok ().

trans-unit.source: See the average mining fees earned per Bitcoin Cash block visualized in BCH and USD over time.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk de gemiddelde mining-kosten die per Bitcoin-blok worden verdiend, gevisualiseerd in BTC en USD in de loop van de tijd.
Fout bij het laden van poolgegevens.

trans-unit.source: Places your transaction in the first mempool block
trans-unit.target: Plaatst je transactie in het eerste mempoolblok

trans-unit.source: See the most recent Bitcoin Cash blocks along with basic stats such as block height, block reward, block size, and more.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk de meest recente Bitcoin-blokken samen met basisstatistieken zoals blokhoogte, blokbeloning, blokgrootte en meer.

trans-unit.source: The overall luck of all mining pools over the past week. A luck bigger than 100% means the average block time for the current epoch is less than 10 minutes.
trans-unit.target: Het algemene geluk van alle miningpools van de afgelopen week. Een geluk groter dan 100% betekent dat de gemiddelde bloktijd voor het huidige tijdperk minder dan 10 minuten is.

trans-unit.source: Waiting for it to appear in the mempool...
trans-unit.target: Waiting for it to appear in the mempool...

trans-unit.source: The number of blocks found over the past week.
trans-unit.target: Het aantal gevonden blokken in de afgelopen week.

trans-unit.source: Average fees per block in the past 144 blocks
trans-unit.target: Gemiddelde vergoedingen per blok in de afgelopen 144 blokken

trans-unit.source: Your balance is too low.Please top up your account.
trans-unit.target: Uw saldo is te laag.Gelieve uw account aan te vullen.

trans-unit.source: Returns the raw block representation in binary.
trans-unit.target: Returns the raw block representation in binary.

trans-unit.source: Returns :length Bitcoin blocks that contain Bisq transactions, starting from :index.
trans-unit.target: Returns :length Bitcoin blocks that contain Bisq transactions, starting from :index.

trans-unit.source: select filter categories to highlight matching transactions
trans-unit.target: selecteer filtercategorieën om overeenkomende transacties te markeren

trans-unit.source: This transaction has a low transaction fee on L1, because of BCH
trans-unit.target: This transaction has a low transaction fee on L1, because of BCH
Fout bij het decoderen van de transactie, reden:

trans-unit.source: How many unique pools found at least one block over the past week.
trans-unit.target: Hoeveel unieke pools de afgelopen week ten minste één blok hebben gevonden.

trans-unit.source: TXID, block height, hash or address
trans-unit.target: TXID, block height, hash or address

trans-unit.source: Transaction hex or base64 encoded PSBT
Returns the confirmation status of a transaction. Available fields: confirmed (boolean), block_height (optional), and block_hash (optional).
trans-unit.target: Returns the confirmation status of a transaction. Available fields: confirmed (boolean), block_height (optional), and block_hash (optional).

trans-unit.source: No data to display yet. Try again later.
trans-unit.target: Geen data om weer te geven. Probeer het later nog eens.

trans-unit.source: Provide a fallback fee if the finalized transaction size can't be estimated reliably (hidden scripts in P2SH).
trans-unit.target: Provide a fallback fee if the finalized transaction size can't be estimated reliably (hidden scripts in P2SH).

trans-unit.source: This transaction was projected to be included in the block
trans-unit.target: Deze transactie zou naar verwachting in het blok worden opgenomen

trans-unit.source: This node hasn't seen any stale blocks yet!
trans-unit.target: Deze node heeft nog geen rotte blokken gezien!

trans-unit.source: Warning! This transaction involves deceptively similar addresses. It may be an address poisoning attack.
trans-unit.target: Waarschuwing! Deze transactie betreft bedrieglijk gelijkende adressen. Het kan een adresvergiftigingsaanval zijn.

trans-unit.source: There is a stale block at this height
trans-unit.target: Er is een rot blok op deze hoogte

trans-unit.source: See the mining fees earned per Bitcoin block compared to the Bitcoin block subsidy, visualized in BCH and USD over time.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk de verdiende miningkosten per Bitcoin-blok ten opzichte van de Bitcoin-bloksubsidie, gevisualiseerd in BTC en USD in de loop van de tijd.

trans-unit.source: This address is deceptively similar to another output. It may be part of an address poisoning attack.
trans-unit.target: Dit adres lijkt bedrieglijk veel op een andere output. Het kan deel uitmaken van een adresvergiftigingsaanval.

trans-unit.source: This transaction ID appears twice in the blockchain as the coinbase of blocks and , due to a bug later mitigated by BIP-30.
trans-unit.target: Dit transactie-ID komt tweemaal voor in de blockchain als de coinbase van blokken en , vanwege een bug die later is verholpen door BIP-30.

trans-unit.source: Based on average native segwit transaction of 140 vBytes
trans-unit.target: Based on average native segwit transaction of 140 vBytes

trans-unit.source: Broadcast a transaction to the Bitcoin Cash network using the transaction's hash.
trans-unit.target: Broadcast a transaction to the Bitcoin Cash network using the transaction's hash.

trans-unit.source: This transaction is stored locally in your browser. Broadcast it to add it to the mempool.
trans-unit.target: Deze transactie is lokaal opgeslagen in uw browser. Zend deze uit om hem aan de mempool toe te voegen.

trans-unit.source: Double check that this transaction sends the funds back to the provided address before signing
trans-unit.target: Double check that this transaction sends the funds back to the provided address before signing
Fout bij het laden van blokgegevens.

trans-unit.source: Returns the hash of the last block.
trans-unit.target: Returns the hash of the last block.

trans-unit.source: Search by student name or ID...
Returns all Bisq transactions belonging to a Bitcoin address, with 'B' prefixed in front of the address.
trans-unit.target: Returns all Bisq transactions belonging to a Bitcoin address, with 'B' prefixed in front of the address.

trans-unit.source: Explore the full Bitcoin Cash ecosystem
See stats for Bitcoin Cash transactions in the mempool: fee range, aggregate size, and more. Mempool blocks are updated in real-time as the network receives new transactions.
trans-unit.target: See stats for Bitcoin Cash transactions in the mempool: fee range, aggregate size, and more. Mempool blocks are updated in real-time as the network receives new transactions.

trans-unit.source: This transaction saved % on fees by using SegWit and could save % more by fully upgrading to native SegWit-Bech32
trans-unit.target: This transaction saved % on fees by using SegWit and could save % more by fully upgrading to native SegWit-Bech32

trans-unit.source: If you specified a Twitter handle, the profile photo should now be visible on this page when you reload.
trans-unit.target: If you specified a Twitter handle, the profile photo should now be visible on this page when you reload.

trans-unit.source: If you donate 0.01 BTC or more, your profile photo will be added to the list of sponsors above :)
trans-unit.target: If you donate 0.01 BTC or more, your profile photo will be added to the list of sponsors above :)

trans-unit.source: Returns the confirmation status of a block. Available fields: in_best_chain (boolean, false for orphaned blocks), next_best (the hash of the next block, only available for blocks in the best chain).
trans-unit.target: Returns the confirmation status of a block. Available fields: in_best_chain (boolean, false for orphaned blocks), next_best (the hash of the next block, only available for blocks in the best chain).

trans-unit.source: Returns a merkle inclusion proof for the transaction using Electrum's blockchain.transaction.get_merkle format.
trans-unit.target: Returns a merkle inclusion proof for the transaction using Electrum's blockchain.transaction.get_merkle format.

trans-unit.source: Returns details about a transaction. Available fields: txid, version, locktime, size, weight, fee, vin, vout, and status.
trans-unit.target: Returns details about a transaction. Available fields: txid, version, locktime, size, weight, fee, vin, vout, and status.

trans-unit.source: Returns the most recently processed Bitcoin block height processed by Bisq.
trans-unit.target: Returns the most recently processed Bitcoin block height processed by Bisq.

trans-unit.source: Get a list of the last 10 transactions to enter the mempool. Each transaction object contains simplified overview data, with the following fields: txid, fee, vsize, and value.
trans-unit.target: Get a list of the last 10 transactions to enter the mempool. Each transaction object contains simplified overview data, with the following fields: txid, fee, vsize, and value.

trans-unit.source: Returns information about a Liquid asset.
trans-unit.target: Returns information about a Liquid asset.

trans-unit.source: Returns current mempool as projected blocks.
trans-unit.target: Returns current mempool as projected blocks.

trans-unit.source: Get transaction history for the specified address/scripthash, sorted with newest first. Returns up to 50 mempool transactions plus the first 25 confirmed transactions. You can request more confirmed transactions using :last_seen_txid (see below).
trans-unit.target: Get transaction history for the specified address/scripthash, sorted with newest first. Returns up to 50 mempool transactions plus the first 25 confirmed transactions. You can request more confirmed transactions using :last_seen_txid (see below).

trans-unit.source: Returns a merkle inclusion proof for the transaction using bitcoind's merkleblock format.
trans-unit.target: Returns a merkle inclusion proof for the transaction using bitcoind's merkleblock format.

trans-unit.source: Returns details about an address. Available fields: address, chain_stats, and mempool_stats. chain,mempool_stats each contain an object with tx_count, funded_txo_count, funded_txo_sum, spent_txo_count, and spent_txo_sum.
trans-unit.target: Returns details about an address. Available fields: address, chain_stats, and mempool_stats. chain,mempool_stats each contain an object with tx_count, funded_txo_count, funded_txo_sum, spent_txo_count, and spent_txo_sum.

trans-unit.source: Returns all Bisq transactions that exist in a Bitcoin block.
trans-unit.target: Returns all Bisq transactions that exist in a Bitcoin block.

trans-unit.source: Returns :length of latest Bisq transactions, starting from :index.
trans-unit.target: Returns :length of latest Bisq transactions, starting from :index.

trans-unit.source: Get unconfirmed transaction history for the specified address/scripthash. Returns up to 50 transactions (no paging).
trans-unit.target: Get unconfirmed transaction history for the specified address/scripthash. Returns up to 50 transactions (no paging).

trans-unit.source: Only ~ sat/vB was needed to get into this block
trans-unit.target: Only ~ sat/vB was needed to get into this block

trans-unit.source: Returns the 10 newest blocks starting at the tip or at :start_height if specified.
trans-unit.target: Returns the 10 newest blocks starting at the tip or at :start_height if specified.

trans-unit.source: This transaction saved % on fees by using native SegWit-Bech32
trans-unit.target: This transaction saved % on fees by using native SegWit-Bech32

trans-unit.source: Returns a transaction as binary data.
trans-unit.target: Returns a transaction as binary data.

trans-unit.source: Default push: action: 'want', data: ['blocks', ...] to express what you want pushed. Available: blocks, mempool-block, live-2h-chart, and stats.Push transactions related to address: 'track-address': '3PbJ...bF9B' to receive all new transactions containing that address as input or output. Returns an array of transactions. address-transactions for new mempool transactions, and block-transactions for new block confirmed transactions.
trans-unit.target: Default push: action: 'want', data: ['blocks', ...] to express what you want pushed. Available: blocks, mempool-block, live-2h-chart, and stats.Push transactions related to address: 'track-address': '3PbJ...bF9B' to receive all new transactions containing that address as input or output. Returns an array of transactions. address-transactions for new mempool transactions, and block-transactions for new block confirmed transactions.

trans-unit.source: Returns the spending status of a transaction output. Available fields: spent (boolean), txid (optional), vin (optional), and status (optional, the status of the spending tx).
trans-unit.target: Returns the spending status of a transaction output. Available fields: spent (boolean), txid (optional), vin (optional), and status (optional, the status of the spending tx).

trans-unit.source: Learn more about The Mempool Open Source Project®: enterprise sponsors, individual sponsors, integrations, who contributes, FOSS licensing, and more.
trans-unit.target: Lees meer over het Mempool Open Source Project®: Enterprise-sponsoren, individuele sponsoren, integraties, wie meehelpt, FOSS-licensering, en meer.

trans-unit.source: See size, weight, fee range, included transactions, audit (expected v actual), and more for Bitcoin block ().
trans-unit.target: Bekijk grootte, gewicht, vergoedingsbereik, inbegrepen transacties, audit (verwachte versus werkelijke) en meer voor Bitcoin blok ( ).

trans-unit.source: See Bitcoin feerates visualized over time, including minimum and maximum feerates per block along with feerates at various percentiles.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk Bitcoin-kosten in de loop van de tijd gevisualiseerd, inclusief minimale en maximale kosten per blok, samen met kosten op verschillende percentielen.

trans-unit.source: See Bitcoin block health visualized over time. Block health is a measure of how many expected transactions were included in an actual mined block. Expected transactions are determined using Mempool's re-implementation of Bitcoin Core's transaction selection algorithm.
trans-unit.target: Zie de gezondheid van Bitcoin-blokken in de loop van de tijd gevisualiseerd. De blokstatus is een maatstaf voor het aantal verwachte transacties dat in een daadwerkelijk gedolven blok is opgenomen. Verwachte transacties worden bepaald met behulp van Mempool's herimplementatie van het transactieselectie-algoritme van Bitcoin Core.

trans-unit.source: See hashrate and difficulty for the Bitcoin network visualized over time.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk de hashrate en moeilijkheidsgraad voor het Bitcoin netwerk in de loop van de tijd gevisualiseerd.

trans-unit.source: See the top Bitcoin mining pools ranked by number of blocks mined, over your desired timeframe.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk de beste Bitcoin-miningpools gerangschikt op het aantal gevonden blokken, gedurende het door u gewenste tijdsbestek.

trans-unit.source: Documentation for our Electrum RPC interface: get instant, convenient, and reliable access to an Esplora instance.
trans-unit.target: Documentatie voor onze Electrum RPC-interface: krijg direct, gemakkelijk en betrouwbaar toegang tot een Esplora-instantie.

trans-unit.source: Get answers to common questions like: What is a mempool? Why isn't my transaction confirming? How can I run my own instance of The Mempool Open Source Project? And more.
trans-unit.target: Krijg antwoorden op veelgestelde vragen zoals: Wat is een mempool? Waarom wordt mijn transactie niet bevestigd? Hoe kan ik mijn eigen exemplaar van The Mempool Open Source Project draaien? En meer.

trans-unit.source: Documentation for the mempool.space REST API service: get info on addresses, transactions, blocks, fees, mining, the Lightning network, and more.
trans-unit.target: Documentatie voor de mempool.space REST API-service: krijg informatie over adressen, transacties, blokken, kosten, mining, het Lightning-netwerk en meer.

trans-unit.source: Documentation for the mempool.space WebSocket API service: get real-time info on blocks, mempools, transactions, addresses, and more.
trans-unit.target: Documentatie voor de mempool.space WebSocket API-service: ontvang realtime informatie over blokken, mempools, transacties, adressen en meer.

trans-unit.source: Get real-time Bitcoin mining stats like hashrate, difficulty adjustment, block rewards, pool dominance, and more.
trans-unit.target: Ontvang realtime Bitcoin-mining-statistieken zoals hashrate, aanpassing van de moeilijkheidsgraad, blokbeloningen, pooldominantie en meer.

trans-unit.source: See mining pool stats for : most recent mined blocks, hashrate over time, total block reward to date, known coinbase addresses, and more.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk mining-poolstatistieken voor : meest recent gedolven blokken, hashrate in de loop van de tijd, totale blokbeloning tot nu toe, bekende Coinbase-adressen en meer.

trans-unit.source: Preview a transaction to the Bitcoin network using the transaction's raw hex data.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk een transactie op het Bitcoin-netwerk met de ruwe hex-data van de transactie.

trans-unit.source: See the most recent stale chain tips on the Bitcoin network.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk de meest recente rotte ketentips op het Bitcoin-netwerk.

trans-unit.source: See Bitcoin mining pool dominance visualized over time: see how top mining pools' share of total hashrate has fluctuated over time.
trans-unit.target: Bekijk de dominantie van Bitcoin-miners in de loop van de tijd gevisualiseerd: zie hoe het aandeel van de topmining-pools in de totale hashrate in de loop van de tijd fluctueert.
